title: Spicy Gluten-Free Thai Sushi Rice Crumble
description: This comforting dish features a crumbly texture made from sushi rice combined with spices and simmered to perfection, ideal for breakfast or snack time.

ingredients.name: 2 cups sushi rice
ingredients.notes: Use gluten-free sushi rice if needed.

ingredients.name: 1/8 teaspoon red pepper flakes (adjust to taste)

instructions: Rinse the sushi rice under cold water until the water runs clear. Transfer to a pot and cover with water.

Add salt, ground cumin, smoked paprika, and red pepper flakes. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for about 20 minutes or until water is absorbed, fluffing gently with a fork after every few minutes.
Once cooled slightly, mix in the tamari sauce, coconut cream, and lime juice until well combined. Stir in chopped fresh cilantro just before serving.
Serve chilled as a snack, topping toasted nuts like walnuts or almonds for added crunch.
